top_signals.title: NovaGold to Buy Billionaire Paulson’s Stake in Alaska Gold Mine
top_signals.summary: NovaGold Resources Inc. agreed to acquire billionaire investor John Paulson’s 40% stake in the Donlin Gold project in Alaska, giving the company full ownership of a giant undeveloped bullion mine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
